title: "Christmas 2005" Commemorative Stamp Issue Order, 2005, SRO 36 of 2005
text:
2005 STAMP S.R.O. 36
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 36 OF 2005
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 22nd December,2005)
1. This Order may be cited as the- Short title.
“CHRISTMAS 2005” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP
ISSUE ORDER, 2005
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 15th November, 2005 to 14th
Stamps.
February, 2006 both days inclusive, there shall be issued through-
out the State, Special Commonwealth of Dominica postage
stamps “CHRISTMAS 2005” COMMEMORATIVE
STAMP ISSUE of values and colours specified in the Schedule
Schedule I.
I and the designs specified in the Schedule II hereto. Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to
Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatsoever
of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the 14th
day of February, 2006.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into force on the Commencement.
15th day of November, 2005.

2005 STAMP S.R.O. 36
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
SINGLE STAMP
1 stamp @ $3.00 - pink, flesh, brown, violet.
1 stamp @ $1.20 - dull red, ochre, salmon rose,
dark blue.
1 stamp @ $0.90 - black, brown, pink
1 stamp @ $0.65 - salmon rose, red orange,
lilac, brown
1 stamp @ $0.50 - black, pink, violet, blue, rose
lilac
1 stamp @ $0.25 - pink, black, black brown,
pale brown
SOUVENIR SHEETS
$5.00 stamp - black, flesh, gray brown, Indian
red
SCHEDULE II
The denominations and designs are as follows:
SINGLE STAMPS
$ 3. 00 stamp depicts - Madonna in glory with the
Seraphim
$ 1.20 stamp depicts - Adoration of Magi
$ 0.90 stamp depicts - Madonna Del Roseto

2005 STAMP S.R.O. 36
$ 0.65 stamp depicts - Madonna and child
$ 0.50 stamp depicts - Madonna and child with angels
$ 0.25 stamp depicts - Madonna and child with two
angels
SOUVENIR SHEET
$5.00 stamp each depicts - Madonna of Frari
Made this 13th day of December, 2005.
AMBROSE GEORGE
Minister for Public Works
and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 60 cents)
